title: Code. Build. Launch.
subtitle: Summer camp for kids ages 8 to 14
tagline: One week. Real projects. No screen-time shame.
hero_concept: A vibrant photograph of kids high-fiving over a laptop with colorful LEGO robots on the desk, bright daylight

sections.heading: What Your Camper Builds
sections.lead_paragraph: By Friday, every camper goes home with something they made. No pre-made demos, no coloring-book coding.
bullets: A robot that obeys voice commands
A website about something they love
A working app that talks to an API

sections.heading: A Typical Day
sections.lead_paragraph: Screens off until after warm-up. Snacks, laughter, and a little bit of chaos — in that order.

sections.heading: Pricing and Sessions
sections.lead_paragraph: One-week intensives from June 16 through August 22. Extended care until 5pm at no extra charge.

back_panel.heading: Ready to sign up?
back_panel.body: Early-bird sessions sell out by April. Register before March 15th and save $75 per week.
